compiled_state.title: As a fix-bug orchestrator, I can search project history for intent evidence before investigating a bug
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add a timeboxed intent search (Gate 1a) that runs before fix-bug begins investigation. The search queries closed/archived tickets, git history on affected files, ADRs/design docs, and code comments to classify the bug as intent-aligned, intent-contradicting, or ambiguous.
**Why**: Many bugs filed by sub-agents are either confirmed by documented intent (can proceed without dialog) or contradict intentional design decisions (can be auto-closed). The intent search eliminates unnecessary user dialogs by finding evidence that already exists in the project.
**Scope**:
- IN: Intent search sub-agent with configurable budget (debug.intent_search_budget in dso-config.conf, default 20 tool calls); specific-to-general keyword strategy; three terminal outcomes (intent-aligned, intent-contradicting, ambiguous); auto-close with evidence citation for intent-contradicting; config key registration
- OUT: Feature-vs-bug language check (Story 2); escalation routing (Story 6); modifying fix-bug's investigation workflow

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, before fix-bug begins investigation, an intent search classifies the bug as intent-aligned, intent-contradicting, or ambiguous
  ← Satisfies: "a timeboxed intent search classifies the bug as intent-aligned, intent-contradicting, or ambiguous"
- When this story is complete, intent-contradicting bugs are auto-closed with a ticket comment citing the evidence source (ticket ID, commit hash, or doc path)
  ← Satisfies: "Intent-contradicting bugs are auto-closed with a ticket comment citing the evidence source"
- When this story is complete, intent-aligned bugs proceed to investigation without user dialog
  ← Satisfies: "Intent-aligned bugs proceed without user dialog"
- When this story is complete, ambiguous bugs (no evidence found within budget) fall through to the next gate
  ← Satisfies: "Ambiguous bugs fall through to the feature-vs-bug language check"
- When this story is complete, the intent search budget is configurable via debug.intent_search_budget in dso-config.conf with a default of 20
  ← Satisfies: "configurable via debug.intent_search_budget in dso-config.conf, default 20 tool calls"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← TDD Done-of-Done

## Considerations

- [Testing] Intent search needs deterministic test fixtures — mock ticket history and git history for reproducible classification results
- [Reliability] Contradictory partial evidence within budget should return "ambiguous" (fail toward dialog), not attempt to adjudicate

comments.body: Consideration: [Integration] Define where in fix-bug's Step 0-8 flow the intent search executes — likely as Step 1.5 between Score/Classify (Step 1) and Investigation Dispatch (Step 2). Establish the insertion pattern for all subsequent gate stories.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All 4 child tasks completed: intent-search agent, config key, RED tests, and Gate 1a SKILL.md integration.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
